task_description: Fix dark mode (remove forcedTheme, integrate toggle), redesign floating cart bar for premium mobile UX, and stabilize navigation/product browse with proper dark mode treatment across all surfaces.

verification.summary: Lint: 0 errors (10 pre-existing warnings unchanged). Tests: 63/64 pass (1 pre-existing failure in security.test.ts about Upstash rate limit config - unrelated).
